title: CRISPR Therapeutics AG Reports Q1 2024 Earnings: Misses Analyst Net Income Forecast
text: CRISPR Therapeutics AG Q1 2024 Earnings Summary. Key Financial Results: Revenue of $504,000 fell far below the projected $26.55 million. Net Loss of $116.59 million, marginally exceeding analyst expectations of -$119.19 million. EPS of -$1.43, underperforming the estimated -$1.33. Cash Position: $2.108 billion as of March 31, 2024. Operational Metrics: The company reduced R&D spending from $99.9 million to $76.2 million year-over-year, while general administrative costs declined to $18 million. Collaboration expenses increased to $47 million compared to $42.2 million in the prior year quarter. Notable Developments: CRISPR has activated over 25 treatment centers globally for its flagship product, CASGEVY. The organization also received a $200 million payment from partner Vertex Pharmaceuticals and raised $280 million through a direct offering. Forward Outlook: Management anticipates multiple data readouts within the next 12-18 months across its clinical programs, including next-generation CAR T candidates and in vivo gene editing initiatives.
